tasks.label: Push update
tasks.command: $msg = '${input:commitMessage}'; git status; git add -A; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'No changes to commit.' } else { git commit -m $msg; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; git pull --rebase origin main; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git push origin main
